ability.category.eliteforge.creator: Creator
ability.eliteforge.absorption.descriptio: Chance to steal health from attackers
ability.eliteforge.armor.description: Passive Resistance effect and armor toughness
ability.eliteforge.berserk.description: Revives once with partial health and gains buffs
ability.eliteforge.bloodthirst.descripti: Heals a percentage of damage dealt
ability.eliteforge.bulwark.description: Grants resistance when HP drops below 30%
ability.eliteforge.chaos.description: Random effects: buffs, debuffs, or environmental hazards
ability.eliteforge.clone.description: Spawns clones when health drops below 50%
ability.eliteforge.confusion.description: Applies Nausea and Blindness; reverses controls at high level
ability.eliteforge.creator_annihilate.de: Triggers a devastating death explosion with warning phase. Higher levels add chain explosions and scorched earth.
ability.eliteforge.creator_assimilate.de: Absorbs abilities and stats from dying elites nearby. The only way creator entities can gain non-creator abilities.
ability.eliteforge.creator_bestowal.desc: Transforms nearby normal mobs into elites with granted abilities at the cost of the creator's health.
ability.eliteforge.creator_commander.des: Commands nearby elites with tactical behaviors including focus fire, surround, and protect tactics.
ability.eliteforge.creator_dominion.desc: Creates an oppressive territory zone that buffs friendly elites and debuffs players within range.
ability.eliteforge.creator_evolution.des: Permanently evolves when taking enough damage, gaining increased health, damage, armor, and speed.
ability.eliteforge.creator_nexus.descrip: Passive aura that nurtures nearby elite mobs, granting level and ability boosts. On death, nearby elites gain Rage effect.
ability.eliteforge.creator_reincarnation: Reborn stronger after death. Each rebirth grants stat boosts and potentially new legendary abilities.
ability.eliteforge.death_touch.descripti: Chance to deal massive damage or instant kill
ability.eliteforge.doom.description: After a countdown, deals massive area damage to all players
ability.eliteforge.fear.description: Forces nearby players to flee in terror
ability.eliteforge.fire.description: Sets targets on fire for a duration based on level
ability.eliteforge.freeze.description: Applies Slowness, Mining Fatigue, and can freeze targets
ability.eliteforge.gravity.description: Pulls nearby players toward the entity
ability.eliteforge.immobilize.descriptio: Chance to completely freeze target in place
ability.eliteforge.immunity.description: Immune to increasing number of negative effects
ability.eliteforge.iron_wall.description: Reduces incoming damage by a percentage
ability.eliteforge.knockback.description: Enhanced knockback and periodic area push
ability.eliteforge.leech.description: Heals for a percentage of damage dealt to targets
ability.eliteforge.lightning.description: Chance to summon lightning on attack
ability.eliteforge.mutation.description: Periodically gains a random additional ability
ability.eliteforge.phase_shift.descripti: Teleports behind nearest player and goes invisible
ability.eliteforge.rage.description: Gains Speed and Strength; doubles below 50% health
ability.eliteforge.siphon.description: Drains hunger and experience from nearby players
ability.eliteforge.spirit_burn.descripti: Deals magic damage that bypasses all resistances
ability.eliteforge.storm.description: Launches a barrage of projectiles at nearby players
ability.eliteforge.supreme.description: Boosts all other ability levels and enhances stats
ability.eliteforge.thorns.description: Reflects a portion of damage back to attackers
ability.eliteforge.void.description: Teleports nearby players to random positions

counter.eliteforge.nexus_forging_hammer: Forging Hammer interrupts Nexus nurturing pulse

difficulty.eliteforge.casual.description: Relaxed mode with lower spawn rates and weaker elites. For casual play.
difficulty.eliteforge.forge.description: Hardcore mode with high spawn rates and powerful elites. For veteran players.
difficulty.eliteforge.mixed.description: Hybrid mode with rare powerful elites and common weaker ones. Balanced experience.

guide.eliteforge.title: EliteForge Guide
guide.eliteforge.page1.line1: EliteForge is a next-generation elite mob mod
guide.eliteforge.page1.line2: combining the best of Champions, Infernal Mobs, and L2Hostility.
guide.eliteforge.page1.line3: Elite mobs are stronger versions of regular mobs
guide.eliteforge.page1.line4: with special abilities, quality tiers, and better loot.
guide.eliteforge.page1.line6: Use /eliteforge info to see current settings.
guide.eliteforge.page1.title: Welcome to EliteForge!
guide.eliteforge.page2.title: Quality Tiers
guide.eliteforge.page3.creator: Creator
guide.eliteforge.page3.note: Note: 19 mutual exclusion pairs prevent OP combos.
guide.eliteforge.page3.title: Ability System
guide.eliteforge.page4.accessory_types: Types: Ring, Necklace, Belt, Charm, Crown
guide.eliteforge.page4.line1: Wear accessories to boost your stats:
guide.eliteforge.page4.tip: Tip: Same-type accessories don't stack — only the highest counts!
guide.eliteforge.page4.title: Accessories & Upgrades
guide.eliteforge.page4.upgrade_location: Right-click the Elite Beacon with an accessory
guide.eliteforge.page5.line1: The highest tier of elite mobs:
guide.eliteforge.page5.line7: Legendary elites can awaken into creators
guide.eliteforge.page5.line8: Requires: high chunk menace + player kills + time
guide.eliteforge.page5.title: Creator Tier & Awakening
guide.eliteforge.page6.tip5: - Chunk menace affects spawn rate & awakening
guide.eliteforge.page6.title: Tips & Configuration
